customizeAudio.title: Customize Audio Overview
customizeAudio.focusLabel: What should the AI hosts focus on in this episode?
customizeAudio.focusPlaceholder:
Things to try
• Focus on a specific source ("only cover the article about Italy")
• Focus on a specific topic ("just discuss the novel's main character")
• Target a specific audience ("explain to someone new to biology")

deep_dive.title: Deep Dive
deep_dive.description: A lively conversation between two hosts, unpacking and connecting topics in your sources

brief.title: Brief
brief.description: A bite-sized overview to help you grasp the core ideas from your sources quickly

critique.title: Critique
critique.description: An expert review of your sources, offering constructive feedback to help you improve your material

debate.title: Debate
debate.description: A thoughtful debate between two hosts, illuminating different perspectives on your sources

customizeFlashcards.title: Customize Flashcards
customizeFlashcards.focusPlaceholder: e.g. Focus on 'Relational Algebra' or 'Keep card fronts under 3 words'...

customizeInfographic.title: Customize Infographic
customizeInfographic.describeInfographic: Describe the infographic you want to create
customizeInfographic.infographicPlaceholder: Guide the style, color, or focus: "Use a blue color theme and highlight the 3 key stats."

auto.label: Auto-select
auto.hint: Balanced layout and palette from your content

sketch_note.label: Sketch Note
sketch_note.hint: Loose lines, markers, and handwritten labels

kawaii.label: Kawaii
kawaii.hint: Soft pastels, rounded shapes, friendly emphasis

professional.label: Professional
professional.hint: Clean grids, restrained color, crisp hierarchy

anime.label: Anime
anime.hint: Bold color blocks, expressive outlines, motion cues

clay.label: Clay
clay.hint: Soft volumes, gentle shadows, tactile surfaces

editorial.label: Editorial
editorial.hint: Magazine rhythm, strong headline, column flow

instructional.label: Instructional
instructional.hint: Numbered flow, clear steps, minimal decoration

bento_grid.label: Bento Grid
bento_grid.hint: Modular tiles with varied weights and spacing

bricks.label: Bricks
bricks.hint: Stacked blocks with mortar rhythm and repetition

customizeQuiz.title: Customize Quiz
customizeQuiz.focusPlaceholder: e.g. Create a 'Final Exam' style review or focus on 'Boyce-Codd Normal Form'...

customizeReport.title: Create report
customizeReport.describeReport: Describe the report you want to create
customizeReport.reportPlaceholder: Tell BETTER-MEMORY how to structure and write your report...

custom.title: Create Your Own
custom.description: Craft reports your way by specifying structure, style, tone, and more

briefing.title: Briefing Doc
briefing.description: Overview of your sources featuring key insights and quotes

study_guide.title: Study Guide
study_guide.description: Short-answer quiz, suggested essay questions, and glossary of key terms

blog_post.title: Blog Post
blog_post.description: Insightful takeaways distilled into a highly readable article

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: A concise synthesis of the essential information from your sources.

technical_report.title: Technical Report
technical_report.description: Detailed technical documentation with specifications, methodologies, data analysis, and findings.

concept_explainer.title: Concept Explainer
concept_explainer.description: Accessible explanations of core concepts with definitions, examples, and relationship mapping.

methodology_overview.title: Methodology Overview
methodology_overview.description: Comprehensive documentation of research methods, frameworks, data collection, and analysis approaches.

customizeSpreadsheets.title: Create spreadsheet
customizeSpreadsheets.describeSpreadsheet: Describe the spreadsheet you want to create
customizeSpreadsheets.spreadsheetPlaceholder: Tell BETTER-MEMORY how to structure and organize your spreadsheet...

custom.title: Create Your Own
custom.description: Create a custom spreadsheet based on your specific requirements and instructions.

data_extraction.title: Data Table
data_extraction.description: Extract and organize key data points, facts, and figures from your sources into a structured table.

comparison_table.title: Comparison
comparison_table.description: Compare and contrast different concepts, products, or ideas across multiple dimensions.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.description: Organize events, milestones, or developments in chronological order with key details.

financial_summary.title: Financial
financial_summary.description: Extract and organize financial data, metrics, and figures into a summary table.

customizeWrittenQuestions.title: Customize Written Questions
customizeWrittenQuestions.focusPlaceholder: e.g. Focus on 'Database Normalization' concepts or create a comprehensive review...
